outputs: Stairwell B: do not hum back. This is not a test.
Return path cannot be calculated while the route remembers you arriving.
The handbook denies having used that term.
Mirror audit complete: one reflection late, none missing.
The water in the west stairwell has passed inspection. It should not be thanked.
warnings: Do not infer a password, route, endpoint, person, or appointment from this entry. Those categories are maintained elsewhere and are not improved by guessing.
A visible command name in a handbook appendix does not constitute a recommendation to use it near a lift, cafeteria queue, or still-water site.
If the response includes a clock, preserve the printed hour but do not compare it with wall time unless all nearby clocks consent.
